summary: team timesheets: skip approvals whose DateRange.Start is empty or unparseable instead of crediting them to every week queried, so a single bad Start no longer ghost-inflates 'submitted' counts.
reason: Greptile pass-3 and pass-4 (logic). The week-range filter only ran when Start was non-empty and only acted when the RFC3339 parse succeeded; on either empty Start or parse failure, execution fell through and stateByUser[uid] was set for whichever week the loop was on, so a single approval with a missing or malformed Start appeared 'submitted' across every week the loop visited. Fix: continue on Start == "" before the parse, continue on parse error after — both treated as 'exclude this approval from this week'.
